title: Phase 1E: Shared UI - ExceptionCard, ApprovalDialog, ConfirmDialog, PageHeader
description: Build shared UI: ExceptionBadge + ExceptionCard for displaying exception details; ApprovalDialog for request/approve/deny flows with reason input; ConfirmDialog for destructive action confirmation; PageHeader with title, breadcrumbs, and action buttons.
steps: Create src/components/shared/exception-card.tsx with ExceptionBadge and ExceptionCard
Display severity, category, owner, SLA countdown, resolution status
Create src/components/shared/approval-dialog.tsx with approval request and response flows
Include approve/deny buttons, reason textarea, approval chain status display
Create src/components/shared/confirm-dialog.tsx for destructive action confirmation
Create src/components/shared/page-header.tsx with title, breadcrumb navigation, action slot
